meaning: n.弄平的人,路面平整机,修光工
examples: WYSIWYG editing makes your word processing smoother and more flexible.
After three months, the women's skin was moister, smoother, and less scaly and red when exposed to ultraviolet light.
Central control and collective organisation can produce smoother and fairer outcomes, though even that much is never guaranteed.
In fact, the Guinness Draught we know today is likely a smoother, less robust version of the original.
At present, hedgers are allowed to match the transactions in one year, meaning smoother earnings.
